Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of data requests per player to improve performance.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage of data resources across different games.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Changed_Other.purpose: Provides more flexibility for developers in managing player data.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Removes the limit on the number of remove requests to data stores per player, filtered by universe.
Changed_Other.purpose: Allows players to manage their data more freely without hitting request limits.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of write requests to the data store based on the universe.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance by preventing too many simultaneous data writes, ensuring smoother gameplay.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
